title: PubSub
description: Sink module for publishing messages to Cloud Pub/Sub

topic.description: Specify the PubSub topic name of the destination

format.description: Specifies the format of the message to publish

idAttribute.description: Specify the attribute name when you want to give an ID to a message as attribute value. The value of the record of the field with the name specified here is used as the ID

timestampAttribute.description: Specify the attribute name when you want to save the event time of the record as attribute value

attributes.description: Specify the field names you want to register as attributes in the message
